div1.entryFree: Toast, subst. dried and scorched bread, dipped in melted butter or put into liquor: fetch me a quart of sack; put a t. in 't, Wiv. III, 5, 3. I pressed me none but such --s and butter, H4A IV, 2, 22 (effeminate fellows).* as rheumatic as two dry toasts, H4B II, 4, 63 (Mrs. Quickly's speech). made a t. for Neptune, Troil. I, 3, 45 (a rich morsel to be swallowed).
